onset.description: Time of event, in seconds since beginning of recording

levels.Sync: Subject synchronized actigraph and amplifier by shaking both toghether
levels.Electrodetest: Subject performed instructions from youtube video
levels.Went_to_Bed: Time(from start) that subject went to bed
levels.Lights_Out: Time(from start) that subject turn the lights off
levels.Got_up: Time(from start) that subject got up

pressedTrigger.description: Whether the subject remembered to press the trigger button at the time of the event

writtenTime.description: The time as written in the diary
